falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 index closes above 4,300 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained rally above this level would contradict the 'bottom' pattern and invalidate the HOLD signal by showing upward momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% and stays above for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate strong risk-on sentiment and contradict the blowoff score's implied bearishness, disproving the pattern's validity

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 65% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would directly invalidate the 86% similarity basis of the current verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
